changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed
changeSet.comment: Add permission_level column for action-level access control in TMMRD

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Technician'

changeSet.comment: Lab Technician can register/create samples on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Technician'

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Researcher'

changeSet.comment: Researcher can register/create samples on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Researcher'

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Pharmacognosist'

changeSet.comment: Pharmacognosist has view-only access on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Pharmacognosist'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Manager'

changeSet.comment: Lab Manager has full control on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Manager'

changeSet.comment: Principal Investigator has view-only access on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Principal Investigator'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%'))

changeSet.comment: Set permission levels for PAGE 4 (Extraction) per TMMRD SRS

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role IN ('Lab Technician', 'Researcher')
notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Pharmacognosist'
notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Manager'

notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Principal Investigator'

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%'))

changeSet.comment: Set permission levels for PAGE 5 (Analytical Pathways) per TMMRD SRS

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Researcher'
notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Pharmacognosist'
notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Manager'

notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Principal Investigator'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 8 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%'))

changeSet.comment: Set permission levels for PAGE 8 (Reporting & Archival) per TMMRD SRS

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 8 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Lab Manager'

notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 8 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Traditional%')) AND role = 'Principal Investigator'
